primaryCredential.notes: FB credentials synced from fb-page skill. Forwarding target in fb-inbox-forward/config.json (NOTIFY_CHANNEL, NOTIFY_TARGET, POLL_INTERVAL_SEC). No hardcoded IDs or tokens.

persistence.description: Polls Facebook Page conversations every POLL_INTERVAL_SEC seconds (default 15). On first start uses 60-second lookback. Forwards new non-page messages via openclaw message send to NOTIFY_CHANNEL/NOTIFY_TARGET from config.
